calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Accounting
Off Calendar May-04-2015 Continued To Jun-01-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Campbell (via court call) for (trustee) Nancy Jo Lawton.

Ms. Campbell reported that they have heard nothing from Kelly Lawton, they are in the process of doing an accounting and that there is still one asset that needs to be transferred. The Court stated that it was not sure the two events should be tied together, was hoping that the inventory and appraisal would have been filed and stated that without the appearance of Kelly Lawton it would take the petition of beneficiary to remove trustee, etc., under submission and continued the status of filing the inventory & appraisal and the accounting petition to June 1, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition Of Beneficiary To Remove Trustee, For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty, To Appoint Successor Truste
Off Calendar May-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Continued To May-04-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Beneficiary To Remove Trustee, For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty, To Appoint Successor Truste
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Continued To May-04-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Beneficiary To Remove Trustee, For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty, To Appoint Successor Truste
Off Calendar Feb-27-2015 Continued To Apr-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Campbell appeared via telephone for (petitioner) Nancy Jo Lawton.

Ms. Campbell reported that Kelly Lawton lives in a gated community, her client is unable to get to the house, she has lived there for 14 years and it is unlikely she has moved and requests an order appointing her client permanent trustee. Ms. Campbell also requested an order to have the ashes turned over, raised the issue of the need to do distribution to the missing person/beneficiary and stated that she would like to have 90 days to do an accounting and request for damages/surcharge. The court questioned whether or not the issue of the ashes is requested in the petition and informed counsel that the surcharge issue should be raised in the accounting petition. The petition to remove trustee for breach of fiduciary duty, etc. was taken under submission, Ms. Campbell is to submit a proposed order. Status on filing of the accounting was continued to April 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order of status hearing is off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Wan. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Continued To Apr-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-15-2014 Continued To Jan-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Beneficiary To Remove Trustee, For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty, To Appoint Successor Truste
Off Calendar Dec-15-2014 Continued To Jan-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Campbell appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

The Court noted that there was no appearance by Kelly Lawton. The Court will suspend Kelly Lawton and appoint Nancy Lawton as temporary trustee. Ms. Campbell will prepare an order. The Petition to Remove Trustee, etc., status on filing of the inventory and appraisal, and the order to appear were continued to January 26, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-15-2014 Continued To Jan-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Beneficiary To Remove Trustee, For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty, To Appoint Successor Truste
Off Calendar Nov-03-2014 Continued To Dec-15-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Campbell (via court call) for (petitioner) Nancy Jo Lawton.

The court asked if there had been any word from Kelly Ann, and stated that she is needed here to engage in mediation and asked if there was any way to contact her. Ms. Campbell stated that they have tried contacting her by mail and telephone with no response and that they need to proceed forward with her client to get the assets distributed. The court stated that it will issue an order to appear to the address that Ms. Campbell has. Ms. Campbell gave the following addresses for Kelly Ann Lawton to the court: 424 Judah Street, San Francisco, CA 94122 and P.O. Box 225222, San Francisco, CA 94122. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Trustee Kelly Ann Lawton to appear on December 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The petition of beneficiary to remove trustee and the status on filing an inventory and appraisal was continued to December 15, 2014 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 and Ms. Campbell may appear via court call.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-03-2014 Continued To Dec-15-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Beneficiary To Remove Trustee, For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty, To Appoint Successor Truste
Off Calendar Sep-22-2014 Continued To Nov-03-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Campbell for and with Nancy Lawton.

The Court waived notice to James Lawton. In terms of mediation, Ms. Campbell stated that they have had no response and do not expect to get one, and that she would like to have her Client appointed as Trustee. The Petition to Remove Trustee, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

1:30 p.m.
The matter is now continued to November 3, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Clerk has advised Counsel.

Petition Of Beneficiary To Remove Trustee, For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty, To Appoint Successor Truste
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Continued To Sep-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
